*   $3\cos\theta \le r \le 3$
*   $-\sqrt{9 - r^2} \le z \le \sqrt{9 - r^2}$

These bounds are well-defined and straightforward for setting up a triple integral.

The most suitable system of coordinates is **Cylindrical Coordinates**.
